english translation text: aa gya hai karwan bazar e shamThe caravan of prisoners has reached the Bazaar of ShamEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
guzren gi kaisy zainab bazaar e sham sywaqif nahi hain bibi palwaaye aam sy
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How will Bibi Zainab(s.a.) pass through the bazar of Sham
She is not accustomed to being paraded in public

urdu transliteration text:
ahmad ki hain nawasian sajjad keh rahy hainsalaar qaafla jo so zakhm seh rahy hainlogo na maro pathar har ik maqaam syguzren gi kaisy zainab bazaar e sham sy
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Sajjad (a.s.) is saying that these are the grand daughters of Prophet Muhammad (s.a)
The leader of the caravan himself is enduring countless wounds
O People, don’t throw stones at them from every direction
How will Bibi Zainab(s.a.) pass through the bazar of Sham

urdu transliteration text:
jis ko salam khud hi allah kar rahy hainus bibion py zaalim yeh zulm dha rahy hainmehroom kar diya hai un ko salam syguzren gi kaisy zainab bazaar e sham sy
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
These are the ones upon whom Allah Himself sends Salaam
The enemies are oppressing these very ladies
They are not being given any respect
How will Bibi Zainab(s.a.) pass through the bazar of Sham

urdu transliteration text:
sham e ghareeban mein zainab bun gai thi ghazihai aj tk imamat baqi zakaat un kiabid ko ja k lai jalty khayam syguzren gi kaisy zainab bazaar e sham sy
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Zainab had become Abbas (a.s.) on Sham e Gareeban
It is because of her services that Imamat is alive today
She brought Imam Sajjad (a.s.) from the burning tents
How will Bibi Zainab (s.a.) pass through the bazar of Sham

urdu transliteration text:
zahra ki sani zainab bazaar mein kharhi hainchadar nahi hai sar py ghairat bhi ro rahi hainhain hath aur gardan bandhay lagaam syguzren gi kaisy zainab bazaar e sham sy
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The successor of Bibi Fatima is standing in the Bazaar
She doesn’t have her veil, even modesty is weeping
Her hands and neck are tied with the horse rein
How will Bibi Zainab (s.a.) pass through the bazar of Sham

urdu transliteration text:
nok e sinaan py naatiq quraan parh raha haiaur sub ko ye khabar hai wo haq py ba khuda haiaandhay huye hain zaalim bs ik inaam syguzren gi kaisy zainab bazaar e sham sy
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The speaking Quran is reciting on the tip of a spear
Everyone knows that He (a.s) is on the right path
The enemies are blinded by the worldly rewards
How will Bibi Zainab (s.a.) pass through the bazar of Sham
